label: Rollover
summary: The onmouseover swap, hide one thing, reveal another on hover or focus, in pure CSS.
era: onMouseOver image swaps: the first bit of interactivity most homepages ever shipped.

classes.name: rs-rollover
classes.role: the wrapper; give it its own accessible name

a11y: The two halves are paint only; the wrapping link or button carries the accessible name. It swaps on focus as well as hover, so keyboard users see it too.
